name: service-blueprinting
description: Service-blueprint lifecycle skill: ingest scattered service docs, co-create from nothing, translate foreign blueprints (FigJam/spreadsheet/Shostack), review with hash-bound sign-off, import via backend adapters (no-DB fallback or Supabase), and evolve deployed blueprints in place. One skill + three agents + three hooks around a validated YAML intermediate representation, presented with the bundled React blueprint template.
